Okay, what's going on? So here is the secret amazing thing about selling supplements is that now you can sell them to people who said no to your service package. What I mean by that is if someone comes in for a trial or challenge or front-end, whatever, right? It's a referral. It doesn't matter who it is. If they walk in your facility and say, I don't want to do it, I need to think about it, I need to talk to my husband, whatever it is, if you have lost the sale, you haven't. What you can do is offer them this program, the 42-day detox or any other play that we have in the arsenal in S3 that you can deploy and give to them based on their needs. So if there's other plays that better match the thing that they came in saying that they were suffering from, if they said they need more energy, then give them a detox thing. If they say they want to build their brother, do a big booty boot camp. If they say they want to build their abs through the six pack, a six week six pack, it doesn't matter what it is, solve their problem with the play that you want to give them and make it an at-home challenge. So here's the key to this. They will say no, and you got to make sure that you don't sacrifice the sale because you know you can close this one. So make sure it's truly a finished sale. Like there's no chance of winning it. But once they're ready to leave you say, hey, you know what? Let me just give this whole thing to you for free. I can't actually do the training with you, but I can give you all the nutrition and all the accountability to help you out. And I can meet with you once a month just to check in on you. So that's unfair. They're gonna say of course and you're like awesome. So let me just schedule your appointment to come in for nutrition orientation. And I'll still walk you through the exact same process that I told you I would do, but you're just not gonna do the workouts with me. Sound fair? They're gonna say wow, you're such a nice guy. Whatever. At that point you're gonna schedule them for their nutrition orientation. But what happens in nutrition orientation? You're gonna sell them supplements. So what that means is let's say you have 10 people who walk in your door and then normally you close five and then five leave. All right. Well, normally that would be it, right? But with this process when 10 people walk in your door, when you sell five, you have five other ones that you're gonna say, hey, why don't you come in for the free version of the thing that I told you that I wasn't able to do, but you're gonna do it at home. You're gonna have five who schedule, three will show, and then of the three who show, two to three should close into a supplement package. And they don't believe me yet, but just look in the group, look at all the times we've done this, it works. Okay, and so that means that you're basically taking your clothes ratio from 50% to 70, 80% by adding this one little thing in. And what's even cooler is that if you're doing trials or front-end things or giving half off or whatever it is to get someone in the door, these people are already on subscription at full price before you've even started. So you already got the end goal, you already got them on subscription, and these are people who are saying no. Okay, so like this is literally the closest thing to free money. It's money that is on the ground, money that was not coming into your pocket that now is. And if you're actually paying for marketing, then you can actually use the money that's coming in from these customers who are formally saying no, and use that to spend even more to acquire even more customers. Okay, this thing, this process is amazing. Okay, so it's the no sale, supplement sale. And then once they come in, you're all you're gonna do is give them the login and access to the portal where they will log in at their own leisure. Right, whether they do that or not is up to you in terms of how much you're gonna follow up with them. But the main point is that out of everything, you are gonna want to follow up with them because you want them to come back a week four so that you can resecure, resell them on the supplements so that you continue to get paid like a real EFT. From what we've seen so far, half the people are buying $200 a month subscription, the other half are buying a $400 a month subscription. And once financing kicks in, you're gonna be able to have unlocked packages at $2400 to $5000. So these people are gonna be legitimately worth $200, $300, $500, $2000 in commissions that you formerly were saying no to. And what's crazy is that what people don't value about service, they value about tangible products. So even if someone says, no, I can't afford it to your fitness package, do not in any way underestimate the fact that they will come in and drop $400, $1000, $2000 on supplements even though they said no to your front-end program. We've seen it happen a zillion times, people value things differently. Okay, so that is the no-sale supplement play. They walk in, if you lose the sale, you offer the free at home play, they come in for the nutrition orientation, you sell them the supplements, and then you make money on people who would normally have walked out the door. Awesome, believe it.
